{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184109EF639088AEBF8993E31A"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400640664960271128","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑清晰，构思严谨，情节紧凑，文笔很好！太祖小迷弟。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723098316,"group_id":"7380294245850024985","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+qSmqm/r0MOBrs50EvSZDw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"12513517435","user_name":"用户12513517"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"12513517435","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380294245850024985","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一个乱世武人所建立的王朝，但这却是我们历史上文化最为昌盛、经济最为繁荣、政治最为清明的王朝，同时这又是武力最为“孱弱”的王朝。这是一个外患最为严重的王朝，这也是一个农民起义最为频繁的王朝，但这却也是一个国祚延续最为长久的王朝。这里有我们最伟大的民族英雄，这里也有我们最卑劣的民族败类。这是一个让我们心生向往的王朝，这也是一个让我们痛心疾首的王朝。

陈桥午夜惊雷，汴京黄昏血泪。斧声烛影谜案，幽州城下饮恨。
澶渊百年和平，夏州遗祸终生。盛世繁华一梦，文人刀笔风流。
边关狼烟不息，武将剑戟沉沙。女真铁蹄来袭，千载后人嗟叹。
